basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) has officially released the Jamadar, Class-3 Recruitment 2026 notification (Advt. No. 413/2026-27) for 1 vacancy across Gujarat. Eligible Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC) or equivalent qualified candidates aged 18 to 33 years can apply online through the GSSSB official recruitment portal. Selected candidates will be appointed on a regular basis with a monthly salary of ₹26,000 – ₹63,200.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 33 years Age relaxation: 10 years for PwD (General), 15 years for PwD (Women/SC/ST/SEBC) (max 45 years).

qualification.education_qualification: Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC) or equivalent, Computer knowledge as per GAD resolution, Gujarati/Hindi knowledge, Physical standards as per rules for male/female
qualification.details: Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC) or equivalent. Computer knowledge as per GAD resolution. Knowledge of Gujarati/Hindi. Physical standards as per rules for male/female candidates.

salary_details.details: Rs. 26,000/- fixed per month for the first 5 years, then Pay Scale Rs. 19,900-63,200 (Level-2).

selection_process: Preliminary Exam (MCQ-OMR/CBRT) Physical Efficiency Test Main Exam (MCQ-OMR/CBRT) Document Verification Merit List
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GSSSB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GSSSB Jamadar, Class-3 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the GSSSB Jamadar, Class-3 recruitment is 18th June 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 33 years as of 18th June 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC) or equivalent, along with computer knowledge and proficiency in Gujarati/Hindi.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Jamadar, Class-3 post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Jamadar, Class-3 position announced in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for different categories?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 400/- for General/OBC and Rs. 400/- for SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for GSSSB Jamadar, Class-3?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Preliminary Exam, Physical Efficiency Test, Main Exam, Document Verification, and finally, a Merit List.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for this post?
faq.answer: The initial salary is Rs. 26,000/- fixed per month for the first 5 years, followed by a pay scale of Rs. 19,900-63,200 (Level-2).

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Gujarat apply?
faq.answer: The notification specifies recruitment for candidates in Gujarat. It's advisable to check the official notification for detailed eligibility regarding domicile.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an age relaxation of 10 years for PwD (General) and 15 years for PwD (Women/SC/ST/SEBC), with a maximum age limit of 45 years.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the apply online link in the "Important Links" section of this article, along with a link to the official GSSSB website.
